reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25sSGRFdHZTekE1UkhFdFJWcDZSMDFvVTBGVVkxRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención malísima vengo cada 15 días y está cada vez peor. Estás sentado esperando que te atiendan y te podes cansar de esperar. El lugar muy sucio con moscas y olor fuerte a pescado. No lo recomiendo. Nos cruzamos a comer al Gran Hotel Mercedes. Increíble la vista, la atención y la comida. Te tratan increíble como uno espera y los precios súper accesibles.

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible. I come every two weeks, and it's getting worse. You're sitting there waiting for service, and you can get tired of waiting. The place is very dirty, with flies and a strong smell of fish. I don't recommend it. We went to eat at the Gran Hotel Mercedes. The view, the service, and the food are incredible. They treat you incredibly, just as you'd expect, and the prices are super affordable.

reviewReply.comment:
Hola! Gracias por tu comentario. 
Lamentamos que tu experiencia no haya sido la esperada y lo tendremos en cuenta para mejorar. 
¡Saludos!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tZMlpFOVdiRXBLZG1kTldVcElZVWhsV2twQllrRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención, no se merece una estrella. Media hora para te atiendan, y eso que eran cuatro mesas ocupadas. No los recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
The service was a disaster; it doesn't deserve one star. It took half an hour to be served, even though there were four occupied tables. I don't recommend them.

reviewReply.comment:
